name: Peter
paragraphs: Peter has spent two decades building digital systems for organizations that can't afford to get it wrong. His background covers web development, content management platforms, and systems architecture — with deep experience across higher education, healthcare, and government.

He doesn't over-engineer. He doesn't cut corners. He builds things that work, and that can be managed without him once they're live. Clients who've worked with Peter tend to come back — not because they have problems, but because they trust him to solve the next thing efficiently.
